Class UserManager

java.lang.Object
model.UserManager
public class UserManager extends Object
Class holding all users
Version:
0.5
Author:
Artur Twardzik

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private Set<User>
    users
    The set of all users managed by this manager.

  • Field Details

    • users

      private Set<User> users
      The set of all users managed by this manager.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserManager

      public UserManager()

  • Method Details

    • usernameExists

      public boolean usernameExists(String username)
      Checks if the username exists in the database of users
      Parameters:
      username - to be checked
      Returns:
      true if this username is already in the db

    • addUser

      public void addUser(User user) throws UserAlreadyExistsException
      Adds new user to the database of users
      Parameters:
      user - to be added
      Throws:
      UserAlreadyExistsException - if user with such username already exists

    • getUser

      public User getUser(String username)
      Gets the user
      Parameters:
      username - specifying the user to be returned
      Returns:
      user or null if no such user exists

    • getUserById

      public User getUserById(String id)
      Gets the user
      Parameters:
      id - specifying the user to be returned
      Returns:
      user or null if no such user exists

    • getUserList

      public Set<UserListRecord> getUserList()
      Retrieves all users records
      Returns:
      user set as String records
